Capstone","details":"Security model:      - All state-mutating functions follow the Checks-Effects-Interactions (CEI) pattern.      - A re-entrancy guard (`_locked`) prevents recursive calls during ETH transfers.      - Participant state is zeroed before any external call, eliminating double-spend risk.      - All constructor arguments are validated to prevent misconfiguration.      Slashing mechanics:      - The slasher earns 10% of the slashed stake as a gas bounty.      - The remaining 90% is forwarded to `slashedFundsSink` (DAO treasury / burn address).      Withdrawal mechanics:      - Active participants may exit at any time and reclaim 100% of their stake.      - Withdrawn participants can rejoin by calling join() again.","errors":{"IncorrectStake(uint256,uint256)":[{"params":{"required":"The amount that was expected.","sent":"The amount actually sent."}}]},"events":{"Heartbeat(address,uint256)":{"params":{"timestamp":"The block timestamp of the heartbeat.","user":"The participant's address."}},"Joined(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"stakeAmount":"The amount staked (always == requiredStake).","timestamp":"The block timestamp at join time.","user":"The address of the new participant."}},"Slashed(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"sinkAmount":"The portion sent to the slashedFundsSink (90%).","slasher":"The address that called slash() and received the bounty.","slasherReward":"The portion of stake sent to the slasher (10%).","user":"The slashed participant."}},"Withdrawn(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The stake returned to them.","user":"The withdrawing participant."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"details":"All parameters are immutable post-deployment. Only the lastHeartbeat field is updated \u2014 stakeAmount remains unchanged."},"isActive(address)":{"details":"Returns false for non-participants (stakeAmount == 0 guard).","params":{"user":"The address to check."}},"join()":{"details":"Participants must send exactly `requiredStake`. Any deviation reverts.      Re-joining after a slash or withdrawal is allowed (stake is reset to 0 on those paths)."},"slash(address)":{"details":"Implements CEI strictly:      1. Checks \u2014 user must be inactive and have stake.      2. Effects \u2014 stake zeroed, count decremented BEFORE any external call.      3. Interactions \u2014 ETH transfers happen last.","params":{"user":"The address of the participant to slash."}},"withdraw()":{"details":"Only active participants (within heartbeat window) may withdraw.      Follows CEI \u2014 stake is cleared before the external ETH transfer."}},"stateVariables":{"_locked":{"details":"Re-entrancy guard. Set to true while a state-mutating call is executing."},"_participantCount":{"details":"Tracks the number of currently active (non-slashed, non-withdrawn) constructor.details: All parameters are immutable post-deployment. Use a governance proxy if upgradability      is desired.

params._heartbeatInterval: Maximum seconds allowed between heartbeats before going inactive.
params._requiredStake: Exact native-token amount participants must stake.
params._slashedFundsSink: Address that receives 90% of every slashed stake.

heartbeat().details: Heartbeat is rejected if the caller is already inactive (missed deadline).      Only the lastHeartbeat field is updated — stakeAmount remains unchanged.

join().details: Participants must send exactly `requiredStake`. Any deviation reverts.      Re-joining after a slash or withdrawal is allowed (stake is reset to 0 on those paths).

slash(address).details: Implements CEI strictly:      1. Checks — user must be inactive and have stake.      2. Effects — stake zeroed, count decremented BEFORE any external call.      3. Interactions — ETH transfers happen last.

params.user: The address of the participant to slash.

withdraw().details: Only active participants (within heartbeat window) may withdraw.      Follows CEI — stake is cleared before the external ETH transfer.

constructor.notice: Deploy the contract with fixed protocol parameters.

getParticipant(address).notice: Returns the full on-chain data for a participant.

heartbeat().notice: Prove liveness by updating the caller's last-heartbeat timestamp.

heartbeatInterval().notice: The maximum number of seconds allowed between consecutive heartbeats.

isActive(address).notice: Returns true if the participant is currently within their heartbeat window.

join().notice: Join the protocol by staking exactly `requiredStake` native tokens.

participantCount().notice: Returns the total number of participants who have not yet been slashed or withdrawn.

requiredStake().notice: The exact amount of native token required to join.

slash(address).notice: Slash an inactive participant and claim a 10% bounty.

slashedFundsSink().notice: The address that receives the 90% sink portion of a slashed stake.

withdraw().notice: Voluntarily exit the protocol and reclaim the full stake.
